---
title: "Implementing and fielding conjoint surveys"
---

## Slides

No slides for this one! 

## Exercises and materials

[*Here's the code for the survey we took on the first day.*](https://github.com/andrewheiss/ice-cream-conjoint)

We'll be building a survey together with [{surveydown}](https://surveydown.org/). Make sure you [grab the latest version of the workshop materials](https://github.com/andrewheiss/mastering-conjoint-analysis-materials_2026-06) first!

We will use these: 

- [Posit Connect Cloud](https://connect.posit.cloud/)
- [{surveydown}](https://surveydown.org/)
- [{sdstudio}](https://sdstudio.surveydown.org/)
- [{cbcTools}](https://jhelvy.github.io/cbcTools/)
- [supabase](https://supabase.com/)

Make sure you install the latest development version of {sruveydown} and {sdstudio}:

```{.r}
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak('surveydown-dev/surveydown')
pak::pak("surveydown-dev/sdstudio")
```
